positive: Stylized graphic design of a mystical woodland creature, a blend of deer and fox, standing gracefully amidst stylized bioluminescent flora. The creature has delicate, ethereal antlers and a rich, mottled coat. Composition must be centered and symmetrical, designed for maximum impact on apparel. Use strong contrast between deep forest emeralds and luminous sapphire/gold accents. High-contrast silhouette style, linocut engraving meets digital maximalism. Crisp, clean lines, geometric patterns visible in the leaves and fur texture. Minimalistic negative space, perfect for print printing. Studio lighting, 8k, vector art style.
negative: blur, grain, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low contrast, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy composition, out of focus, cartoonish, realistic photo, noise, smudge
